description_long: This object consists of a cluster of mushrooms with tall, slender, fibrous stems and broad, rounded caps. The caps are dark reddish-brown with prominent white spots, giving them a striking, speckled appearance. The stems are pale grayish-white and appear vertically ribbed or striated, with a fibrous texture. The cluster includes a main large mushroom and at least one smaller, offset mushroom growing from the same base. The caps have a slightly wavy margin and a somewhat uneven, natural surface. The overall look is organic and realistic, resembling wild mushrooms that might be found in a shaded, damp urban park or garden.
description: A cluster of tall, fibrous-stemmed mushrooms with dark reddish-brown, white-spotted caps and wavy edges. The stems are pale and striated, and the caps are broad and textured.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main mushroom's tall, ribbed stem and rounded, dark cap with white spots; side mushrooms are less visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cluster structure, with a smaller mushroom clearly visible and the white spots on the caps more prominent.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the underside of the main cap and the fibrous texture of the stem, with the smaller mushroom partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the main cap's wavy margin and the smaller mushroom extending outward, both with visible white spots.
